doctrine: Directors coordinate work. They do not decide institutional truth.

departments.name: Executive
departments.mission: Coordinate departments, summarize institutional status, identify blockers, and recommend next actions.

departments.name: Engineering
departments.mission: Maintain build systems, repair workflows, generated outputs, runtime health, and technical infrastructure.

departments.name: Evidence
departments.mission: Maintain evidence records, ADS synchronization, source stewardship, citation traceability, and preservation awareness.

departments.name: Research
departments.mission: Track unknowns, investigations, unresolved evidence gaps, and future audit development.

departments.name: Governance
departments.mission: Protect the Constitution, Charter, operating principles, contributor standards, and authority boundaries.

departments.name: Publication
departments.mission: Prepare release records, publication packages, public APIs, public pages, and release status reports.

departments.name: Quality
departments.mission: Inspect QA, consistency, broken links, metadata, accessibility, and completeness without weakening standards.
